testimonials.quote: The champagne PVD partition arrived perfectly finished — even more stunning than the renders. Our Mumbai office lobby looks world-class.
Vyomika Atelier understood our showroom brief immediately. Packaging was secure, installation was smooth, and the wave divider is a showstopper.
We ordered a custom coffee table and PVD handles for our Pune residence. Quality is exceptional — already planning the next partition.

services.name: PVD Partitions
services.summary: Custom wave, fluted, and laser-cut PVD partition systems with online sq ft calculator.
services.content: Engineered stainless partitions in champagne gold, rose gold, matte black, and bespoke finishes. Each system is fabricated to your dimensions with Pan-India delivery and installation support.
care: Material: Grade 304/316 stainless with PVD coating
Designed in: Mumbai, India
Fabrication: Vyomika Atelier LLP studio — custom dimensions
Care: Wipe with soft microfibre; avoid abrasives
Installation: Pan-India delivery available

portfolio.title: Champagne Wave Office Lobby
portfolio.summary: A sculptural PVD partition system defining reception and meeting zones without blocking natural light.
portfolio.content:
The brief called for a statement divider that felt premium yet open. We fabricated wave-profile panels in champagne PVD stainless, integrating concealed fixings and acoustic backing where required.

Installation was completed over a single weekend to minimise disruption to the occupied floor plate.
portfolio.design_details:
Wave-profile PVD partitions spanning 14 metres
Concealed ceiling and floor channels
Acoustic felt backing on selected panels
Integrated LED grazing for evening ambience
materials: Grade 304 stainless steel with champagne PVD coating
Matte micro-texture finish on reverse face
portfolio.testimonial_quote: The partition transformed our lobby — clients notice it immediately. Fabrication quality and on-site coordination were excellent.
portfolio.meta_title: Champagne Wave Office Lobby — PVD Partitions in Mumbai | Vyomika Atelier LLP
portfolio.meta_description: Custom champagne PVD wave partitions for a Mumbai tech campus lobby — precision fabrication and installation by Vyomika Atelier LLP.

portfolio.title: Rose Gold Retail Showroom
portfolio.summary: Room dividers and display partitions in rose gold PVD for a luxury retail environment.
portfolio.content: Rose gold PVD dividers create intimate vignettes within an open-plan showroom while maintaining sightlines to key merchandise walls.
portfolio.design_details:
Fluted and flat panel combination
Rose gold PVD mirror finish
Freestanding and wall-anchored modules
portfolio.testimonial_quote: The rose gold finish photographs beautifully and has held up perfectly under daily foot traffic.

portfolio.title: Corten Entrance Screen
portfolio.summary: Weathering steel entrance screen developing a rich patina at a commercial arrival court.
portfolio.content: A laser-cut Corten screen marks the main arrival sequence while providing shade and visual privacy. Panels were pre-weathered to accelerate initial patina development.
portfolio.design_details:
Laser-cut geometric pattern — custom artwork
3 mm Corten panels on steel sub-frame
Pre-weathered finish with drainage detailing
materials: Mild steel structural frame — hot-dip galvanised
Stainless fixings — isolation pads at interfaces
portfolio.testimonial_quote: The entrance screen has become the signature element of the development — the patina is exactly what we envisioned.
portfolio.meta_title: Corten Entrance Screen — Delhi Commercial | Vyomika Atelier LLP
portfolio.meta_description: Custom Corten steel entrance screen with laser-cut pattern — architectural metalwork in Delhi by Vyomika Atelier LLP.
